title: Life Begins for Andy Hardy
writer: Agnes Christine Johnston, Aurania Rouverol, Carey Wilson
actors: Lewis Stone, Mickey Rooney, Judy Garland
plot: Hoping his son will attend his alma mater, Judge Hardy agrees to let Andy look for work in New York for the summer before committing to start college. In the big city, Andy is confronted with the harsh realities of life and love.
